famous quote:

User added:
""If you love me, you will obey my commandments."
‭‭John‬ ‭14:15‬ ‭NET‬‬‬‬‬‬

How many times have you read this in your heart as, "I will love you if..."? O, brothers and sisters in Christ, the love of our Savior is engraved on His hands, His head, His back, His feet, His side. Christ Jesus has loved you from eternity past to now, and will love you from now to eternity future. Nothing will change that! Now, Jesus says, you are free to do likewise. Today, live love, freely!

"For we are his workmanship, having been created in Christ Jesus for good works that God prepared beforehand so we may do them."
‭‭Ephesians‬ ‭2:10‬ ‭NET‬‬‬‬‬‬

-Sean Lennon
Interview Text:
Bryan Farrar:

(part 2)

This is another story I recorded when interviewing Bryan Farrar:

We thought it would be easy to get pregnant. We kept seeming to hear stories of people getting pregnant before they were ready. But when we were ready after 2 years of marriage we tried and couldn't. Only then did friends come out and told us they had waited for 3 years sometimes. 

She was frustrated and cried every month because she wasn't getting pregnant. 

She started talking about fertility options. I was hesitant about it. I started praying about it. I asked Him, "Why are fertility treatments not the route we should go?" God said, "Be patient." Patience has always been a tough thing for me. I felt strongly about this and was trying to lead well spiritually. So I put my foot down and said we are not doing fertility treatment. She was not happy with me, in fact she was super pissed. This was the first thing I had ever decided to put my foot down on, because I felt it was coming from God. A couple weeks after that we found out she was pregnant! She was probably even already pregnant when we had our conversation.

I was in Houston when Jen went into labor 3 weeks early. At 2 am her water broke. I got the next flight home and made it in time. 

The thing I took from that was that I get frustrated when we want something. But sometimes God has already given it to us. Sometimes you already have what you want, you just don't know it yet. 

My wife and I remind each other of these stories. The concept of Ebenezer is important. They built altars to remind them what God has done. It's so important to tell each other the stories of God's faithfulness.
Music Video Instructions: Picture this being how God loves us, and how we can love him.
